goal: Promote existing renderer-neutral delete selection planning into a documented adapter conformance/template contract without adding renderer dependencies.
checkpoints: after JDC-020 template delete smoke passes
after JDC-030 package closeout gates pass
side_effect_policy: User authorized autonomous commits in this session; commit only verified bounded work, do not push, and do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: delete contract requires DOM, renderer, wgpu, egui, Fret, screenshot, or pixel dependency inside jellyflow-core or jellyflow-runtime
async onBeforeDelete parity becomes necessary inside runtime
schema migration is required for persisted deletable policy fields
